projects.name: health-info-translations
projects.description: Translate vetted public-health information into low-resource languages.
projects.definitionOfShipped: A reviewed translation set delivered to the requesting NGO.

projects.name: oer-math
projects.description: Open educational resources (math) for under-funded schools.
projects.definitionOfShipped: Practice sets published openly and handed to the partner school district.

projects.name: civic-open-data
projects.description: Use open public datasets to produce new analyses and derivative open datasets.
projects.definitionOfShipped: A published derivative dataset + analysis with source provenance and license.

projects.name: vital-info-translations
projects.description: Translate vetted public-health & safety guidance into low-resource languages.
projects.definitionOfShipped: A reviewed, correctly-licensed translation set delivered to and adopted by a partner NGO/health authority.

projects.name: a11y-alttext-commons
projects.description: Alt-text & image descriptions for openly-licensed media, contributed upstream.
projects.definitionOfShipped: Reviewed descriptions merged upstream into open collections (Commons structured data, open textbooks).

projects.name: open-data-datasheets
projects.description: Documentation & metadata that makes public open datasets reusable.
projects.definitionOfShipped: A datasheet + machine-readable metadata accepted onto a dataset's portal, with verified license + provenance.

projects.name: proper-prepper
projects.description: Offline-first, ad-free disaster-preparedness toolkit (PWA) + localized content.
projects.definitionOfShipped: A deployed, offline-capable toolkit adopted/endorsed by a partner emergency-management org.

projects.name: tool-atlas
projects.description: An open, structured atlas of tools and how to use them safely.
projects.definitionOfShipped: A published atlas with peer-reviewed entries adopted by an education/makerspace partner; structured data under CC-BY.

projects.name: beacon-game
projects.description: An original game-with-a-purpose: play produces verified humanitarian/science image labels.
projects.definitionOfShipped: A deployed open-source game that has produced verified labels accepted by a real data partner.

projects.name: revolutionary-patriots-kg
projects.description: Open, linked knowledge graph of American Revolution patriots, built from public-domain sources.
projects.definitionOfShipped: A published, openly-licensed, queryable graph with provenance on every assertion, adopted/cited by a partner.

projects.name: public-official-guide
projects.description: Non-partisan AI guide helping public officials fulfill duties, serve constituents, and govern ethically.
projects.definitionOfShipped: Adopted by a pilot office and used to improve a constituent outcome / fulfill a duty, with guardrails verified by an independent ethics reviewer.

projects.name: loc-public-domain-engine
projects.description: Rights-gate + polite API protocol over the Library of Congress, fanning cleared public-domain items into transcription/OCR/alt-text/translation/dataset work.
projects.definitionOfShipped: A cleared, provenance-tracked item pool + contributions accepted upstream (By the People / Commons).

projects.name: open-data-explainers
projects.description: Plain-language explainers & lightweight tools built from verified open datasets; each module decomposes into per-region tasks.
projects.definitionOfShipped: Explainers/tools adopted by a partner/community, accurate and source-cited.

projects.name: literacy-from-zero
projects.description: Teach reading from absolute zero (print awareness -> phonics -> fluency) for a child or unschooled adult, fully internationalized.
projects.definitionOfShipped: Learners progress from zero toward reading; materials adopted by a partner school/NGO.

projects.name: irish-gaeilge-learning
projects.description: Structured Irish (Gaeilge) learning course (spoken + written, audio, CEFR-aligned) built to support language revitalization.
projects.definitionOfShipped: Course used by learners; native-speaker reviewed; adopted by a partner.

projects.name: ewing-open-data-catalog
projects.description: Open, license-clear index + datasheets of open Ewing Sarcoma datasets. Open-access/aggregate/de-identified data only; controlled-access out of scope.
projects.definitionOfShipped: Published catalog + datasheets adopted/cited by a research/advocacy partner.

projects.name: ewsr1-fli1-knowledge-graph
projects.description: Open knowledge graph of EWSR1-FLI1/ETS fusion biology for Ewing Sarcoma, synthesized from open sources with provenance on every assertion. No patient data.
projects.definitionOfShipped: Published open, provenance-tracked KG adopted/cited by researchers.
